flashcards.definition: Automated investment platform that builds and manages a diversified portfolio based on your goals and risk tolerance.
Tool for filtering stocks based on criteria: market cap, P/E ratio, dividend yield, sector, etc.
Computer model running thousands of random scenarios to estimate the probability of investment outcomes.
Testing an investment strategy against historical data to see how it would have performed in the past.
Application Programming Interface for accessing real-time and historical financial data programmatically.
